reasoning: Google is one of the three main contenders for the #1 spot on Chatbot Arena, alongside OpenAI and Anthropic. Assuming an uninformative state around October 2025, where all three are likely trading blows with next-generation models (e.g., Gemini 2/3, GPT-4.5/5/Orion, Claude 4), I assign Google approximately a 22% chance. This accounts for roughly an equal three-way split slightly skewed toward OpenAI as the historical incumbent, with a minor adjustment for tie-breaking rules (Google beats OpenAI in alphabetical ties, but loses to Anthropic).
